message:
refactor(policy,tools,supply-chain): update policy engine, tooling, and cross-cutting modules

Policy Engine (17 files):
- decision_engine.rs, evidence_emission.rs: Core decision and evidence refinements
- guardrail_monitor.rs, hardening_auto_trigger.rs, hardening_clamps.rs,
  hardening_state_machine.rs: Hardening pipeline and state machine updates
- bayesian_diagnostics.rs: Bayesian risk analysis refinements
- compat_gates.rs, compatibility_gate.rs: Compatibility enforcement
- controller_boundary_checks.rs: Boundary validation updates
- integrity_sweep_scheduler.rs: Sweep scheduling improvements
- object_class_tuning.rs, perf_budget_guard.rs: Object classification and budgets
- policy_explainer.rs: Decision explanation generation
- retroactive_hardening.rs: Retroactive policy enforcement

Tools (25+ files):
- adversarial_resilience_metrics.rs, containment_revocation_metrics.rs,
  security_trust_metrics.rs: Security metrics refresh
- benchmark_methodology.rs, benchmark_suite.rs, version_benchmark_standards.rs:
  Benchmark tooling updates
- compatibility_correctness_metrics.rs, performance_hardening_metrics.rs,
  replay_determinism_metrics.rs: Correctness and performance metrics
- evidence_replay_validator.rs: Replay validation enhancements
- enterprise_governance.rs, partner_lighthouse_programs.rs: Governance tooling
- external_replication_claims.rs, frontier_demo_gate.rs: Replication and demo gates
- migration_incident_datasets.rs, migration_speed_failure_metrics.rs,
  migration_validation_cohorts.rs: Migration tooling
- profile_tuning_harness.rs, redteam_evaluations.rs: Profiling and red team
- report_output_contract.rs, repro_bundle_export.rs: Reporting
- reputation_graph_apis.rs, safe_extension_onboarding.rs: Reputation and onboarding
- transparent_reports.rs, vef_perf_budget_gate.rs, verifier_benchmark_releases.rs: VEF tooling
- mod.rs: Updated tool exports

Supply Chain (9 files):
- artifact_signing.rs, certification.rs: Supply chain signing and certification
- ecosystem_telemetry.rs, extension_registry.rs: Telemetry and registry
- manifest.rs, migration_kit.rs: Manifest and migration
- quarantine.rs, reputation.rs: Quarantine and reputation management
- mod.rs: Updated supply chain exports

Also updates: remote/ (bulkhead, eviction, fault injection, idempotency),
observability/ (durability, evidence, witness), ops/ (mitigation synthesis),
migration/ (bpet, dgis gates), extensions/, federation/, claims/,
conformance/, verifier_economy/, perf/

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
